_meta.description: Benchmark data for A*. Useful depots are placed on the route corridor with ~89km between consecutive points (<100km segment limit). Extra depots are placed far east as distractors, so the shortest valid path should use only the useful depots, not every depot in the fixture.

bench_10._description: 10 depots total: 3 useful corridor depots and 7 noise depots. Expected path_len=5.

bench_15._description: 15 depots total: 5 useful corridor depots and 10 noise depots. Expected path_len=7.

bench_20._description: 20 depots total: 7 useful corridor depots and 13 noise depots. Expected path_len=9.

bench_30._description: 30 depots total: 10 useful corridor depots and 20 noise depots. Expected path_len=12.

bench_50._description: 50 depots total: 17 useful corridor depots and 33 noise depots. Expected path_len=19.

bench_100._description: 100 depots total: 34 useful corridor depots and 66 noise depots. Expected path_len=36.
